title: lotus glaber
intro: Lotus glaber, also known as the Egyptian lotus or Egyptian white lotus, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of lotus glaber include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizomes and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
